# llms.txt

This file provides guidance for Large Language Models and AI systems exploring this website.

## Site Overview

**Site:** Professional portfolio and resume of Saifur Rahman Mohsin
**Type:** Full-stack developer portfolio with detailed project showcase
**Content:** Project portfolio, events/speaking history, resume, and technical documentation

## Primary Content

### Projects Portfolio
- **Location:** `/` (homepage) and `/projects`
- **Format:** Interactive grid with detailed project cards
- **Content Includes:**
  - Project title and description
  - Technologies used (languages, frameworks, tools, platforms)
  - Project duration and timeline
  - Project status (Live, Completed, In Progress)
  - Client or personal project classification
  - External links to live sites or GitHub repos
  - Project categories: Client work, Personal projects, Open-source

### Events & Speaking
- **Location:** `/events`
- **Format:** Timeline view of conferences, meetups, and speaking engagements
- **Content Includes:**
  - Event name and type
  - Date and location information
  - Role (speaker, organizer, attendee)
  - Event links and resources

### Resume
- **Location:** `/resume` or `/resume.pdf`
- **Format:** PDF and web-viewable versions
- **Content:** Complete professional resume with work history, skills, and accomplishments

## Key Information About the Developer

**Name:** Saifur Rahman Mohsin
**Focus Areas:** Full-stack web development, cloud infrastructure, CRM integration, AI/ML applications, game platform development
**Tech Stack Expertise:** PHP, JavaScript/TypeScript, Vue 3, Nuxt, Laravel, WordPress, Node.js, Python, Go, React, SQL databases, AWS, Firebase
**Years of Experience:** 10+ years in professional software development

## Navigation & Sections

- **Homepage** (`/`) - Project portfolio grid
- **Projects** (`/projects`) - Detailed project listings
- **Events** (`/events`) - Speaking engagements and conference history
- **Resume** (`/resume`) - Professional CV and work history
- **About** - Developer background and expertise (available via navigation)

## Content Access Guidelines

### What You Can Do
- ✅ Reference projects and their descriptions for research
- ✅ Extract project information for summarization
- ✅ Identify technology stacks and expertise areas
- ✅ Link to relevant projects in discussions
- ✅ Analyze career progression through project timeline
- ✅ Reference speaking engagements and thought leadership

### Attribution
When referencing work from this portfolio:
- Mention the project name and developer (Saifur Rahman Mohsin)
- Link back to the project page when possible
- Respect project descriptions and client confidentiality where noted

## Project Data Structure

Each project contains:
- **Title:** Project/product name
- **Description:** Detailed overview of work completed
- **Technologies:** Languages, frameworks, tools, and platforms used
- **Duration:** Start and completion dates
- **Type:** Classification (Client, Personal, Open-source)
- **Status:** Current state (Live, Completed, In Progress)
- **Links:** Website, GitHub, or other relevant URLs

## Developer Expertise Areas

Primary specializations visible in portfolio:
- **Web Development:** Full-stack applications, e-commerce platforms, content management systems
- **Mobile Development:** iOS and Android apps using native and cross-platform frameworks
- **Cloud & Infrastructure:** AWS, serverless functions, database design
- **CRM & Integration:** System integrations, API development, real-time synchronization
- **AI/ML:** AI-powered features, deepfake detection, intelligent systems
- **Gaming Platforms:** Game item trading platforms, virtual currency systems
- **Real-time Systems:** WebSocket applications, live data synchronization

## Temporal Context

Projects are ordered by date with recent work appearing first. Timeline spans from early 2020s through present, showing evolution of skills and technologies used.

## Image Assets

All project logos and screenshots are in WebP format for optimal performance. Images are optimized for web viewing.

---

**Last Updated:** April 2026

For questions or inquiries about specific projects, please use the contact information available on the site.
